meta.title: Watch SpaceX's Falcon Heavy Launch a Top Secret Satellite! #USSF67
meta.description:
USSF-67 is classified mission for the United States Space Force lifting off from Launch Complex 39A at the Kennedy Space Center in Florida, USA. USSF-67 will be inserted directly into a GEO by SpaceX’s Falcon Heavy, which will fly for the fifth time in total and the first time this year.

Want to learn more? Check out our Prelaunch Preview!!! - https://everydayastronaut.com/ussf-67-falcon-heavy-2/

00:00 - Intro
03:10 - Prelaunch Preview
10:15 - Starship Predictions
12:38 - Q&A
20:20 - SpaceX Stream Starts
35:24 - Launch
37:55 - Booster Separation
43:04 - Booster Landing
44:30 - Q&A

--------------------------
